pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Gayden's backpassin' his way to last place like he's tryin' to set a record.** Both Turkey and the USA have been grindin', but Devin's squad got the edge with experience and a dash of straight-up Ghost Pepper heat. Gayden picked Turkey like he was draftin’ for a kebab competition instead of a World Cup, and it’s showin' in the standings where my man is sittin' pretty at the bottom. Look, I got Devin’s USA team just ghostin’ Turkey on this one — no doubt, it’s gonna be a clean sweep and Gayden will be back to backpassin' again.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Keeps First Place After South Africa's Lone Goal
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin maintains lead while Gayden wonders if Korea's bus arrived.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Just Misses Top Spot as Brazil Dominates Scotland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach blames world-class flair while eating humble pie.

pundit_takes.headline: The Backpass Assassin Prepares for USA Clash with Turkey
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gayden hopes for a win and somehow avoids sending it backwards.

pundit_takes.headline: Noisemaker Surprises with Mexico's Shutout of Czechia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Rafe insists it wasn't a fluke but promises better draft next time.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gayden holds the basement with a sweet-looking 0 total points today.
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency is the highest at 0.32 and he's laughing.
Rafe's 6-point h2h dominance over Devin must sting like a ghost pepper.
Rafe, the chaos agent, wrecks the sim's prediction accuracy from the inside.
